summary: Configured sioyek multi-window behavior: added should_launch_new_window preference, close_window q binding, and --reuse-instance flag to desktop entry. Different PDFs now open in separate windows, and q closes only the current window.

completion_data.completion_summary: Configured sioyek PDF viewer for multi-window behavior with should_launch_new_window preference, close_window q keybinding, and --reuse-instance desktop entry flag. Different PDFs now open in separate windows.

next_steps: Rebuild Home Manager configuration with 'home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin' and test multi-window behavior
